Financial

The Financial Law Department includes the disciplines of Public Finance, Economics for Lawyers, and Tax Law. Economics for Lawyers and Public Finance courses are being taught in English. Courses of Public Finance and Economics are taught in the second grade, which forms a background for the practice of Fiscal Law to be taught in the third grade. In the Economics and Public Finance courses, the concepts of ‘justice’ and ‘equality’ are evaluated concerning the principles of Private Economics and given in an approach supporting other law courses.

Courses

LAW 452 International Tax Law (Lisans)

LAW 403 Economics for Lawyers
